scores.correctness_notes: Core API usage is correct. Missing: params as Mapping type, wait parameter, TaskError/ValueError/TimeoutError error handling, task.success and task.message attributes, task.return_code, task.id. The task.raise_on_failure() method is not in the gold standard and may be hallucinated.
scores.hallucination_notes: task.raise_on_failure() is not mentioned in the gold standard Task attributes and appears to be hallucinated. The gold standard specifies error handling via raised exceptions (TaskError, ValueError, TimeoutError) from juju.run() itself, not a method on Task.
